basicDetails.schemeName: Dr. Dhyanpal Singh Memorial Award (for Final-Year Undergraduate Students of All Colleges)
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnaga

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Dr. Dhyanpal Singh Memorial Award (for Final-Year Undergraduate Students of All Colleges)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to support and encourage meritorious students in their final year of undergraduate studies by reducing financial burdens.
schemeContent.benefits_md: The selected students will receive an amount of ₹30,000/- per year in their final year of undergraduate.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to support and encourage meritorious students by providing them with monetary assistance of ₹30,000/- in their final year of undergraduate studies, thereby reducing financial burdens.

children.text: The “Dr. Dhyanpal Singh Memorial Award (for Final-Year Undergraduate Students of All Colleges)” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to support and encourage meritorious students in their final year of undergraduate studies by reducing financial burdens.
The selected students will receive an amount of ₹30,000/- per year in their final year of undergraduate.

Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the students receive their payments.

applicationProcess.process_md: Students are first invited to submit their applications on the prescribed form. A committee, constituted by the Vice Chancellor, then reviews and evaluates these applications following a defined procedure. Based on the committee’s recommendations, the Vice Chancellor grants approval, after which the students receive their payments.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a student. 1. The applicant must be enrolled in the final year of an undergraduate course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar. 1. The award amount is provided once per year.

children.text: The applicant must be a student.
The applicant must be enrolled in the final year of an undergraduate course at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
The award amount is provided once per year.
